prompt: Create a dark gothic anime portrait of Bloody Queen, shown from the chest up in a dramatic three-quarter pose against a nearly black greenish background. She has voluminous pale silver-white hair swept back from a center part, with loose curling ringlets on both sides and delicate inked strands, rendered with high-contrast highlights and shadow. Her face is intentionally hidden by one large centered opaque square censor block in muted gray-brown, covering the eyes, nose, mouth, and most facial features while leaving the hair, jawline, neck, and clothing visible. She wears a deep blood red Victorian blouse or dress with a plunging neckline, layered ruffled collar, structured shoulders, and heavy black shadow folds, evoking a sinister royal vampire aesthetic. Use an elegant horror-manga illustration style with painterly shading, fine linework, muted desaturated colors, moody chiaroscuro lighting, and a tense aristocratic atmosphere, vertical portrait composition, no text, no border.
